rowCount.description: The number of rows in the grid.

columnCount.description: The number of columns in the grid.

frozenRowCount.description: The number of rows that are frozen in the grid.

frozenColumnCount.description: The number of columns that are frozen in the grid.

hideGridlines.description: True if the grid is not showing gridlines in the UI.

rowGroupControlAfter.description: True if the row grouping control toggle is shown after the group.

columnGroupControlAfter.description: True if the column grouping control toggle is shown after the group.
